chunks.title: Ziba's Gift to David
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit where Ziba meets David and receives Mephibosheth's estate.

chunks.title: Shimei Curses David
chunks.reason: A continuous narrative of Shimei cursing David and David's response to Abishai.

chunks.title: Absalom Enters Jerusalem
chunks.reason: The conclusion of the chapter covering Absalom's arrival and Ahithophel's counsel.
